title: Shapes
description: 1.20.6 beta - Shapes is a performance and QOL modpack.
body:
# **Shapes**

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73188a1f5f59fe427bbe000122124d614b10bedb.png)

This modpack shapes minecraft into a much more pleasing experience.

## **📜 About this modpack**
This modpack is based off of Additive. It is a performance optimization and QOL modpack that works in multiplayer servers, so you can play it with your friends on ANY server. I will fully update the modpack when every one of the mods have been updated to newer Minecraft versions. The modpack is made for Fabric and Quilt mod loaders.

## **🛠️ Mods featured in this modpack**
| Mod                 | What it does         |
|:--------------------|:---------------------|
| 3D Skin Layers      | Makes skin layers 3 dimensional |
| Animatica           | Adds supprot for custom animated textures |
| BadOptimizations    | A collection of small optimizations |
| BetterF3            | Makes the F3 menu more readable |
| CIT Resewn          | Adds custom item textures |
| Capes               | Allows you to add your own custom capes |
| Chat Reporting Helper | Explaines chat reporting in a more human way |
| Cloth Config API    | An essential API |
| Continuity          | Makes connected textures possible |
| Cubes Without Borders | Allows you to have borderless fullscreen |
| Dynamic FPS         | Reduces resource usage when the game is in the background |
| Ears                | Adds more skin customization options |
| EmuNO               | Disables various MacOS-specific features |
| Enhanced Block Entities | Reduces FPS lag with block entities |
| Entity Culling      | Skips rendering on entities that are not visible |
| Fabric API          | An essential API |
| Fabric Language Kotlin | An essential API |
| FabricSkyBoxes Interop | Adds Interoperability to FabricSkyBoxes |
| FabricSkyBoxes      | Allows resource packs to have custom skyboxes |
| Fast Better Grass   | Allows grass and other blocks to use their top textures on the sides |
| FastQuit            | Allows you to quit your world quickly by saving it in the background |
| FerriteCore         | Reduces Minecrafts memory usage |
| Fix Keyboard on Linux | Fixes keyboard bugs on Linux |
| ImmediatelyFast     | Speeds up immediate mode rendering |
| Indium              | Adds support for Fabric Rendering API |
| Iris Shaders        | Allows you to use shaderpacks |
| LambDynamicLights   | Adds dynamic lights to the game |
| LazyDFU             | Makes the game boot faster |
| Lithium             | Optimizes game logic and servers |
| Loqui               | Translates ALL mods (apparently) |
| Main Menu Credits   | Adds a way of adding info on the Title Screen |
| Mod Menu            | Lets you view all the mods and edit their configs |
| ModernFix           | All-in-one performance and optimization mod |
| More Culling        | Culls a lot of different things |
| No Chat Reports     | Makes chat unreportable |
| Noisium             | Optimizes worldgen performance |
| Not Enough Animations | Adds a lot of animations to third person |
| Not Enough Crashes  | When Minecraft crashes, you get sent to the title screen instead of the desktop |
| OptiGUI             | Adds custom GUI textures |
| Polytone            | Allows you to tweak many things using resource packs |
| Puzzle              | Adds GUI to conveniently customize OptiFine alternatives |
| Reese's Sodium Options | Makes Sodium's UI a bit more pleasing |
| Sodium              | Greatly improves performance |
| Sodium Extra        | Adds more stuff to Sodium |
| Starlight           | Rewrites Minecrafts lighting engine to increase performance |
| ThreadTweak         | Improves CPU scheduling |
| World Host          | Host singleplayer worlds without a server |
| YetAnotherConfigLib | Essential library |
| Your Options Shall Be Respected | Provides default options if the corresponding option file doesn't exist |
| Zoomify             | Adds a highly customizable zoom feature |
| Entity Model Features | Adds support for custom entity models |
| Entity Texture Features | Adds new entity texture features |

## **❓ FAQ**

> **Q:** How do I add more mods or remove some?
> 
> **A:** Use the Modrinth Launcher (only way I know) and add content to it or press the delete button on one of the mods.

> **Q:** You should add this!
>
> **A:** DM me at Discord @outorotta7. I might answer.
